codeReview.summary: The feature implementation is complete and correct. The worker created coverage-verification.json with an exhaustive cross-reference matrix mapping all 26 Course Timeline topics (21 technical, 5 non-technical) to the question bank and lecture content. All 21 technical topics show coverage in both mega-question-bank.js and lecture-content.html. The coverage claims are verified and accurate.

sharedStateObservations.observation: AGENTS.md and architecture.md contain outdated counts that don't reflect the expanded question bank (231 vs actual 309 questions). Workers will see conflicting information about platform state.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: AGENTS.md line: '53 root-level HTML files' (actual: 28), architecture.md line: '231 quiz questions' (actual: 309). The expansion happened via add-missing-quiz-questions feature but these docs were never updated.

sharedStateObservations.observation: AGENTS.md lists categories as: 'internet, html, css-fundamentals, css-layout, js-basics, js-control-flow, js-functions, js-objects' but the actual question bank now has additional categories: html-forms, css-responsive, js-classes, js-dom, js-events, web-apis.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: coverage-verification.json shows 14 categories including the new ones. The original 8 categories in AGENTS.md are outdated.

sharedStateObservations.observation: AGENTS.md lists the source material directories correctly but with incorrect file counts (53 and 19 vs actual 28 and 14).
sharedStateObservations.evidence: AGENTS.md says '53 root-level HTML files' for slides/ and '19 root-level HTML files' for slides/New/ but inventory shows 28 and 14 respectively.

summary: Feature implementation passes review. The worker correctly created an exhaustive cross-reference matrix showing 100% coverage of all 21 technical Course Timeline topics. No code issues identified. Shared state docs (AGENTS.md, architecture.md) contain outdated counts and category listings that should be updated separately.
